ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., AY.1 (Delta)) */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the variant (e.g., Delta, Omicron) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "transmission_rate" REAL /* Estimated rate of transmission for the variant */,
  "symptomatic_rate" REAL /* Rate at which individuals infected with the variant show symptoms */,
  "vaccine_efficacy" REAL /* Efficacy of current vaccines against the variant */,
  "first_detected" TEXT /* Date and location where the variant was first detected */,
  "mutations" TEXT /* List of mutations specific to the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or jurisdiction */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state or jurisdiction */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or jurisdiction */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the state or jurisdiction */,
  "health_authority" TEXT /* Name of the health authority responsible for the state or jurisdiction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure (e.g., Share, Share Low, Share High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the measure */,
  "aggregation_type" TEXT /* Type of aggregation used for the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or jurisdiction reporting the data */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being reported */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure being reported */,
  "measure_values" REAL /* Value of the measure (e.g., share, share low, share high) */,
  "total_sequences" INTEGER /* Total number of sequences analyzed for this variant */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was reported */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source from which the data was collected */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_data_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_data_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, epidemiologist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions granted to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES variant_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant data was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the variant data */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the variant data */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_versions_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being evaluated */,
  "quality_date" TEXT /* Date when the data quality was evaluated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "quality_check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check performed */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES variant_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant causing the outbreak */,
  "outbreak_date" TEXT /* Date when the outbreak occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the outbreak */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported during the outbreak */,
  "outbreak_size" TEXT /* Size of the outbreak (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "response_team" TEXT /* Name of the response team handling the outbreak */,
  "containment_status" TEXT /* Status of containment efforts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreaks_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)
